children.id: Authentication UI Tests
UI_AUTH_USR_002 - Normal user login with incorrect password is prohibited
UI_AUTH_ADM_001 - Admin can log in with correct credentials
UI_DASH_ADM_001 - Admin dashboard shows the required summary cards only
UI_AUTH_USR_001 - Normal user can log in with correct credentials
UI_AUTH_USR_003 - Normal user login with empty password is prohibited
UI_AUTH_USR_005 - User logout ends the session
UI_AUTH_USR_004 - Login with empty username and non-empty password is prohibited
Plants UI Tests
UI_PLT_USR_006 - Verify that user does not see the Sell Plant button
UI_PLT_ADM_005 - Verify that admin user can't delete a plant that has a sales record
UI_PLT_USR_004 - Verify that user blocked from Add Plant page
UI_PLT_ADM_001 - Verify that admin users should be able to add a new plant with valid data
UI_PLT_USR_005 - Verify that user can view the sales page
UI_PLT_USR_008 - Verify that empty sales list displays a message
UI_PLT_ADM_003 - Verify that category in plants page is a subcategory
UI_PLT_USR_001 - Verify non-admin can view plant list
UI_PLT_USR_002 - Verify non-admin does not see Add Plant button
UI_PLT_ADM_002 - Verify that admin users get redirected to plants page when click cancel at add plant page
UI_PLT_USR_009 - Unauthenticated user accessing plants is redirected to login
UI_PLT_USR_010 - User can sort the plant list by price
UI_PLT_ADM_004 - Verify that admin users can't add a plant with zero price
UI_PLT_USR_007 - Verify that user does not see the delete button on sales rows
UI_PLT_USR_003 - Verify non-admin can search a relevant plant
Sales API Tests
API_POST_SLS_ADM_002 - Creating a sale exceeding available stock returns an error
API_POST_SLS_USR_002 - Normal user cannot create a sale
API_DEL_SLS_ADM_004 - Admin deletes a sale successfully
API_GET_SLS_ADM_005 - Admin can get the sales list sorted by date descending
API_DEL_SLS_USR_001 - Normal user cannot delete a sale and receives 403
API_POST_SLS_ADM_003 - Creating a sale with quantity zero is rejected
API_GET_SLS_USR_001 - Normal user can get a sale by id
API_POST_SLS_ADM_001 - Admin creates a sale and plant stock is reduced
Plants API Tests
API_POST_PLT_ADM_002 - Admin cannot create a duplicate plant in the same category
API_DEL_PLT_ADM_005 - Admin can delete an existing plant
API_GET_PLT_USR_001 - Verify non-admin can see all plants
API_DEL_PLT_USR_002 - Normal user cannot delete a plant
API_PUT_PLT_USR_001 - Normal user cannot update a plant
API_POST_PLT_ADM_001 - Admin creates a valid plant under a sub-category
API_GET_PLT_ADM_001 - Verify admin can view all plants
API_POST_PLT_ADM_006 - Backend must accept the exact Swagger example body and return 201 (contract compliance)
API_GET_PLT_USR_003 - Normal user can retrieve all plants
API_POST_PLT_USR_001 - Verify non-admin cannot create plant
API_POST_PLT_ADM_003 - Admin cannot create a plant with negative quantity
API_POST_PLT_ADM_007 - Backend must not return 500 when optional Swagger fields are included (error handling)
API_GET_PLT_USR_002 - Verify non-admin can get plant by ID
API_GET_PLT_USR_005 - User can sort plants by price ascending
API_PUT_PLT_ADM_004 - Admin updating a plant with a non-existent id returns 404
API_GET_PLT_USR_004 - User can filter plants by category
Categories UI Tests
UI_CAT_ADM_001 - Admin can see the Add A Category button
UI_CAT_ADM_006 - Verify Cancel redirects to Categories Page
UI_CAT_USR_001 - Normal user cannot see category management controls
UI_CAT_ADM_003 - Category search filters by an existing category name
UI_CAT_USR_004 - Unauthenticated user accessing categories is redirected to login
UI_CAT_ADM_004 - Verify Add A Category button is clickable
UI_CAT_ADM_007 - Verify admin can save a new category
UI_CAT_ADM_002 - Admin can see edit and delete buttons for every category
UI_CAT_USR_003 - Verify non-admin cannot edit or delete categories
UI_CAT_ADM_005 - Verify admin can add category name
UI_CAT_USR_002 - Verify no category found message
UI_CAT_ADM_008 - Verify admin can create sub category
Authentication API Tests
API_POST_AUTH_USR_003 - Login request with an empty body fails
API_POST_AUTH_USR_001 - Normal user login returns an auth token
API_POST_AUTH_USR_002 - Normal user login with incorrect password fails
API_GET_AUTH_USR_001 - Calling a protected endpoint without authentication returns 401
API_POST_AUTH_ADM_001 - Admin login returns an auth token
Sales UI Tests
UI_SLS_ADM_001 - Admin sells a plant successfully
UI_SLS_ADM_002 - Selling a plant with quantity zero shows an error
UI_SLS_USR_001 - Unauthenticated user accessing sales is redirected to login
UI_SLS_ADM_003 - Admin deletes a sale record successfully
UI_SLS_ADM_004 - Sales list is sorted by date descending by default
UI_SLS_ADM_005 - Cancel on Sell Plant page navigates back to sales list

API_PUT_CAT_ADM_001 - Verify admin can update category
